prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 11924→10089→11877→12825→20484，2025 年因新高考选科分组出现较大波动，政治学类（再选思想政治）位次大幅后移至约 20484 名，其余专业组（再选化学/不限）位次约 10898–13420 名；近 3 年整体呈后移趋势，2025 年基准约 20484 名；该校在四川理科/物理类计划 2021 年 52 人、2022 年 48 人、2023 年 49 人、2024 年 50 人、2025 年 46 人；2026 年计划 37 人，较 2025 年明显缩招约 19.6%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜参考山东大学本部约第 22 名，威海校区共享校本部办学层次与资源，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（山东大学本部学伴事件遗留影响），但威海校区相对独立；抖音热度排名第 20 位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；数学 A+、中国语言文学 A、外国语言文学 A、法学 A-、应用经济学 A-、工商管理 A-、物理学 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、控制科学与工程 A、海洋科学 A-；威海校区招生专业覆盖数学类、电子信息类、物理学类、海洋科学类、经济学类等，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类/电子信息类社会热度高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，数学/统计推荐，经济学分化观望；四川省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 535000 人，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 462767 人明显增加，竞争加剧；山东大学（威海）位于山东威海，属东部沿海城市，对四川考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年物理类位次大幅后移的基准、2026 年计划明显缩招（竞争缓解）、四川省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及学校高热抖音曝光度；预测最低位次约 18109 名，区间 17609–18609 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 11924→10089→11877→12825→20484. In 2025, due to significant fluctuations caused by the new Gaokao subject selection grouping, the ranking for the Political Science category (with a re-selection requirement of Ideological and Political) dropped sharply to about 20484, while other major groups (with re-selection requirements of Chemistry/No Restriction) had rankings around 10898–13420. Over the past 3 years, the overall trend has been a backward shift, with a baseline of about 20484 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Sichuan was 52 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 46 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 37, a significant reduction of about 19.6% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, Shandong University's main campus is approximately 22nd, and the Weihai campus shares the main campus's level and resources, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the lingering impact of the Shandong University main campus 'study partner' incident), but the Weihai campus is relatively independent. Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, attracting significant application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Disciplines: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Business Administration A-, Physics A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A, Marine Science A-. The Weihai campus offers majors covering Mathematics, Electronic Information, Physics, Marine Science, Economics, etc., with strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science/Electronic Information are highly recommended with high social heat, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Mathematics/Statistics are recommended, Economics is divided with a wait-and-see approach. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, a significant increase from the combined total of about 462,767 for Physics and History categories in 2025, intensifying competition. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has a certain regional appeal to Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward shift in rankings for the 2025 Physics Category, the clear reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (easing competition), the substantial increase in the number of candidates in Sichuan Province (intensifying competition), and the high Douyin exposure of the school; the predicted minimum ranking is about 18109, with a range of 17609–18609.

- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class, including Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Political Science (including Political Science and Administration, International Politics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17609–18609, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (Mathematics and Electronic Information are the most competitive), and Tier 3 Political Science as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), you can focus on reaching for the top-tier majors in Tier 1.
